DisplayName.SourceString: WASTELANDER DUMMY'S LEVEL UP QUEST PACK
DisplayName.LocalizedString: WASTELANDER DUMMY'S LEVEL UP QUEST PACK

DisclaimerText.SourceString: Note: This purchase is not eligible for refund. Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString: Note: This purchase is not eligible for refund. Not all items may be available in Save the World mode.

ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="EBBC31FF">Get the Wastelander Dummy Outfit with purchase </><text color="FFFFFFFF">and complete weekly quests in Battle Royale to earn up to 28 levels and unlock cosmetic rewards!</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Complete quests by collecting </><text color="EBBC31FF">Level Up Tokens</><text color="FFFFFFFF"> throughout the Chapter 5 map before the end of Season 3.</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Each week new quests become available and can be completed until the end of the season (August 16 2024 ET).</>
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="EBBC31FF">Get the Wastelander Dummy Outfit with purchase </><text color="FFFFFFFF">and complete weekly quests in Battle Royale to earn up to 28 levels and unlock cosmetic rewards!</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Complete quests by collecting </><text color="EBBC31FF">Level Up Tokens</><text color="FFFFFFFF"> throughout the Chapter 5 map before the end of Season 3.</>

<text color="FFFFFFFF">Each week new quests become available and can be completed until the end of the season (August 16 2024 ET).</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Every quest: 1 full XP level per token</>
Name.LocalizedString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Every quest: 1 full XP level per token</>

Name.SourceString: <text color="FFFFFFFF">Week 1: </>Wastelander's Wheel <text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" Case="AllCaps">Back Bling</>
